display.purpose: Homepage H1 only. Never reused on inner pages at this size.

headline.purpose: Section headings (h2). The workhorse heading level.

title.purpose: Hub page H1s, article headings, card names.

body.purpose: All paragraph copy and FAQ answers. Max 65-75ch on desktop.

label.purpose: Nav links, button text, tags, form labels.

shadows.name: surface
shadows.purpose: Feature cards, stat cards. Standard card elevation.

shadows.name: surface-medium
shadows.purpose: Service cards. Slightly more prominent for image-bearing cards.

shadows.name: dark-feature
shadows.purpose: Letter card on dark section ONLY. Never use elsewhere.

motion.name: state-change
motion.purpose: Button hover, link color, border color transitions.

motion.name: icon-rotate
motion.purpose: FAQ icon +/x rotation, dropdown arrow, hamburger spans.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Applied via prefers-reduced-motion: reduce to all transitions.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Small phones. Further text reduction, single-column grids.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Tablets and phones. Hamburger nav, stacked grids, sticky bar visible.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The only orange element that is a button. Used for every primary CTA: Book a Repair, Call Us Now, Schedule a Repair.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: var(--brand, #e84c1e); color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 26px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--brand-dark, #cc3d12); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brand, #e84c1e); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dark Button
components.description: Secondary action. Pressed Steel background. Used when the primary button already occupies the viewport (e.g. below the hero).
components.css: .ds-btn-dark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: var(--text-primary, #111111); color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-dark:hover { background: #222222; } .ds-btn-dark:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brand, #e84c1e); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Tertiary action. Transparent fill with a Linen border. Used for Discover More or secondary nav actions that must not compete with primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: var(--text-primary, #111111); font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border-medium, #dddddd); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(--text-inactive, #aaaaaa); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brand, #e84c1e); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Image-bearing card for appliance types. 16px radius. Used in the services grid (3 columns desktop, 1 column mobile).
components.html:
Refrigerator Repair
Our experts fix refrigerator issues quickly, keeping your fridge running smoothly.
Learn More →
components.css: .ds-service-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-service-card__img { width: 100%; height: 200px; object-fit: cover; display: block; } .ds-service-card__body { padding: 20px 22px 24px; } .ds-service-card__name { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary, #111111); margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-service-card__desc { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--text-sub, #666666); line-height: 1.7; } .ds-service-card__link { display: inline-block; margin-top: 14px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: var(--brand, #e84c1e); font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; } .ds-service-card__link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

components.name: Brand Tag
components.description: Used to list appliance brands serviced. Pill-adjacent, not fully rounded. White surface, slate-navy text. Wraps via flexbox.
components.css: .ds-brand-tag { display: inline-block; background: #ffffff; border: 1.5px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; color: #1e293b; }

components.name: FAQ Item
components.description: Accordion item with aria-expanded state management. Shadow-defined boundary, no border. The + icon rotates 45deg when open.
components.html: We repair refrigerators, stoves, washers, dryers, dishwashers, ovens, freezers, garbage disposals, microwaves, and wine coolers.
components.css: .ds-faq-item { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); margin-bottom: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-faq-q { width: 100%; text-align: left; padding: 18px 22px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary, #111111); background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 12px; min-height: 44px; } .ds-faq-q:hover { background: var(--hover-surface, #f9fafb); } .ds-faq-q:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brand, #e84c1e); outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-faq-icon { font-size: 18px; color: var(--text-inactive, #aaaaaa); flex-shrink: 0; transition: transform 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-faq-item--open .ds-faq-icon { transform: rotate(45deg); } .ds-faq-a { padding: 0 22px 18px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-sub, #666666); line-height: 1.8; display: none; } .ds-faq-item--open .ds-faq-a { display: block; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-faq-icon { transition: none; } }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Metric display card used in the stats grid. Ember number, dust label. Used in hub pages and about section.
components.html:
8+
Years in Orange County
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); padding: 28px 20px; text-align: center; } .ds-stat-number { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--brand, #e84c1e); letter-spacing: -1px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-sub, #666666); margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Sticky Mobile Bar
components.description: Signature conversion component. Fixed at viewport bottom on mobile only. Left = Call (Ember), Right = Book (Pressed Steel). Always 56px tall, 50/50 split, 44px+ tap targets.
components.html: Call NowBook Repair
components.css: .ds-sticky-bar { display: none; position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 200; height: 56px; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ds-sticky-bar { display: flex; } } .ds-sticky-bar__call { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: 1; height: 100%; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; background: var(--brand, #e84c1e); color: #ffffff; gap: 6px; } .ds-sticky-bar__call:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: -3px; } .ds-sticky-bar__book { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: 1; height: 100%; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; background: var(--text-primary, #111111); color: #ffffff; } .ds-sticky-bar__book:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: -3px; }

components.name: Nav CTA Button
components.description: Compact variant of the primary button used in the fixed navigation. Slightly smaller padding (7px 16px), 7px radius. Hidden at mobile (sticky bar takes over).
components.css: .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: var(--brand, #e84c1e); color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; padding: 7px 16px; border-radius: 7px; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: var(--brand-dark, #cc3d12); } .ds-nav-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--brand, #e84c1e); outline-offset: 2px; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .ds-nav-cta { display: none; } }

narrative.overview:
This is a system built like a good repair: nothing wasted, everything earned. Every surface, shadow, and color exists because it solves a problem for a stressed homeowner on a 375px screen who needs to book a repair in the next thirty seconds. Decoration that doesn't serve conversion is not decoration; it's friction.

The palette is restrained orange over light gray. The typography is weight-driven, not size-driven. The component set is small and confident. There is one button color in the system, and it means one thing: take action now.

This system explicitly rejects the aesthetics of national appliance-chain franchises, HVAC corporate sterility, and over-engineered local service site templates that feel more like a tech startup than someone who shows up with tools.
keyCharacteristics: Single accent color used only for action (calls, bookings, CTAs)
Weight contrast drives heading hierarchy; Inter at 800 and 400 feel like different typefaces
Shadows are ambient and structural, never decorative
Mobile sticky bar anchors conversion at every scroll position
Dark section uses deep brown warmth, not generic dark navy

rules.name: The One Ember Rule
rules.body: Craftsman's Ember appears on 10% or less of any given screen. Every CTA is orange; decorations are not.

rules.name: The Warm Footer Rule
rules.body: The footer dark section uses #090909 (brown-shifted near-black), not cold #000. This warmth connects to Ember on dark surfaces.

rules.name: The Weight-Over-Size Rule
rules.body: When in doubt, add weight rather than increasing size. A 14px 700-weight label reads more distinct from 14px 400-weight body than 16px 400.

rules.name: The Tracking Rule
rules.body: Tight tracking (-1.5px to -0.5px) is reserved for display and headline sizes only. Body and label text runs at default or zero tracking.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a structural signal that an element is above the surface beneath it. No hover shadows on cards.

rules.name: The Dark Feature Exception
rules.body: The 0 24px 70px rgba(0,0,0,0.50) shadow is permissible on the letter card over the dark section only. Using it anywhere else is prohibited.

dos: Do use Craftsman's Ember exclusively for calls to action, phone number emphasis, focus rings, and brand icons.
Do drive heading hierarchy with weight contrast (800 vs 700 vs 400) before reaching for size increases.
Do maintain min-height: 44px on all interactive elements at mobile viewports.
Do use Ghost (#aaa) for decorative/inactive UI elements and Chalk (#767676) minimum for any text that carries meaning.
Do include aria-expanded, aria-controls, and keyboard event handlers on any element with toggled visibility.
Do write prefers-reduced-motion: reduce overrides for every CSS transition in shared.css.
donts: Don't use Craftsman's Ember as a decorative color — no orange section backgrounds, no orange emphasis text.
Don't use the national-chain or corporate-HVAC aesthetic: no cold blue primary colors, no clean-white-with-teal-accents.
Don't introduce a second accent color. Star Gold exists only for rating stars.
Don't apply border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, list items, or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill).
Don't use glassmorphism as decoration. The nav backdrop-filter is structural only.
Don't introduce an identical icon-heading-text card grid.
Don't write body copy with em dashes.
Don't make the footer dark with cold blacks or generic navy.
